report.summary: Cycle-close v19: Delta from v18 — TS errors rose 142→154 (+12, new file tokenized-real-estate-guide-2026). Git index.lock persists ~14h. 120 pending files (up from 105). Publish queue changed: 2 new items (tokenized-real-estate, web3-gaming-gamefi), both have page.tsx and are ready to promote.

sections.title: Data Engineer

No API route code changes since Mar 14 — all stable
Cache TTLs configured: prices 60s, trending 300s, fear-greed 600s, market-metrics 60s, market-dominance 300s

CoinGecko free tier still in use — no API key, rate limit risk persists
Cannot verify live API responses (egress blocked) — no data freshness check this cycle

sections.title: DevOps

Modified files include OG images (morpho, privacy-coins, smart-wallets, ton-blockchain) and degen-publish-queue.skill
next.config.ts: ignoreBuildErrors=true still shields Vercel from 154 TS errors
ACTION NEEDED: rm .git/index.lock → stage → commit → push to trigger Vercel deploy
